svg.aria-label: Chrono Valley banner: Mohammad Umer — Chief AI Officer at Kanban Studios. Agentic AI, full-stack, Industry 4.0/5.0, 6x competition podiums. A living painted valley that cycles through dawn, day, dusk and night: the sun arcs and sets, a moon and stars take over, a lighthouse sweeps, trains cross a viaduct, wind turbines spin and fireflies glow.
svg.title: Mohammad Umer — Chrono Valley, a living day-night world

g.text: agentic ai • full-stack • industry 4.0/5.0 • 6x competition podiums
